blended.narrative: Whiteface is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 300 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tuesday: 8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
